title: Brodie Croft
extract:
Brodie Croft (born 14 July 1997) is an Australian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a stand-off for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League. 
He previously played for Salford Red Devils in the Super League, with whom he won the Man of Steel Award and the Albert Goldthorpe Medal, and Melbourne Storm with whom he won the 2018 World Club Challenge and the Brisbane Broncos as a scrum-half in the NRL.
